text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, November 16. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
